de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class Taclet.TacletLabelHint

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.Taclet.TacletLabelHint
  • Enclosing class:
    Taclet

    public static class Taclet.TacletLabelHint
extends Object
    Instances of this class are used as hints to maintain TermLabels.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  Taclet.TacletLabelHint.TacletOperation
      Defines the possible operations a Taclet performs.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Sequent sequent
      The optional Sequent of the add or replace part of the taclet.
      private SequentFormula sequentFormula
      The optional SequentFormula contained in getSequent().
      private Taclet.TacletLabelHint.TacletOperation tacletOperation
      The currently performed operation.
      private Deque<Term> tacletTermStack
      The stack maintained during application of a taclet Term.
      private Term term
      The optional replace Term of the taclet.
